name: Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix graham cracker crumbs and melted butter together. Press the mixture into the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan. Chill in the freezer.
2. While preparing the filling, cream together sugar and room-temperature cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in 1/3 cup amaretto (or 1/2 cup Disaronno Amaretto).
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
6. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Bake for 42-45 minutes until the center is nearly set.
7. Allow cooling, then refrigerate overnight.
